Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on 2023-01-07. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia tag unexpected language
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
  • wikipedia from wikidata tag
  • wikipedia from wikidata tag, unexpected language
  • wikidata from wikipedia tag
  • wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal
wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:be', 'wikipedia:en']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Нёман / Неман / Nemunas - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:ru']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Котра - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:ru']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Neris / Вілія - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:lt']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Curonian Spit - an affected OSM element that may be improved

wikipedia tag in outdated form (['wikipedia:be']), with wikipedia and wikidata tag present and may be safely removed
Birvėta / Бірвета - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(189775)['wikidata'='Q5622']['wikipedia'='lt:Nemunas']['wikipedia:be'='Рака Нёман']['wikipedia:en'='Neman']; relation(282218)['wikidata'='Q2371196']['wikipedia'='be:Котра (рака)']['wikipedia:ru'='Котра']; relation(2824450)['wikidata'='Q207903']['wikipedia'='lt:Neris']['wikipedia:ru'='Вилия']; relation(309762)['wikidata'='Q5595']['wikipedia'='en:Curonian Spit']['wikipedia:lt'='Kuršių nerija']; relation(8114508)['wikidata'='Q2499700']['wikipedia'='lt:Birvėta']['wikipedia:be'='Рака Бірвета']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q12649140 vs Q32156565
Armoliškės - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q12658254 vs Q32154402

[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(2470446723)['wikidata'='Q12649140']['wikipedia'='lt:Armoliškės']; node(3678914634)['wikidata'='Q12658254']['wikipedia'='lt:Juodeniai']; node(3906401723)['wikidata'='Q16471561']['wikipedia'='lt:Rudakasos']; relation(6908878)['wikidata'='Q16475623']['wikipedia'='lt:Varpučiai (Vilkaviškis)']; relation(6908879)['wikidata'='Q16478168']['wikipedia'='lt:Šikšniai (Vilkaviškis)']; relation(6912795)['wikidata'='Q12661843']['wikipedia'='lt:Kurmiškiai (Vilkaviškis)']; relation(6912797)['wikidata'='Q16469307']['wikipedia'='lt:Peletrūnai']; relation(7494706)['wikidata'='Q12672536']['wikipedia'='lt:Sausininkai']; relation(7889833)['wikidata'='Q16475082']['wikipedia'='lt:Vaisbūniškiai']; relation(8193398)['wikidata'='Q12650578']['wikipedia'='lt:Bebrininkai']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']
